title: Update module github.com/opencontainers/cgroups to v0.0.7
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/cgroups](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups) | `v0.0.6` → `v0.0.7` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.7?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fcgroups/v0.0.6/v0.0.7?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/cgroups (github.com/opencontainers/cgroups)</summary>

### [`v0.0.7`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/releases/tag/v0.0.7)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.6...v0.0.7)

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​54](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/54)
- build(deps): bump actions/cache from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​55](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/55)
- build(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 8 to 9 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​51](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/51)
- Switch to Go 1.24 as a min version, bump CI, modernize sources by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​28](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/28)
- feat: add ability to get individual controller stats by [@​sambhav-jain-16](https://redirect.github.com/sambhav-jain-16) in [#​53](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/53)
- CODEOWNERS: fix by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​57](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/57)
- config\_rdma: change omitempty to omitzero by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​58](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/58)
- Fix BPF-related fd leaks by [@​rata](https://redirect.github.com/rata) in [#​60](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/60)

#### New Contributors

- [@​sambhav-jain-16](https://redirect.github.com/sambhav-jain-16) made their first contribution in [#​53](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/53)
- [@​rata](https://redirect.github.com/rata) made their first contribution in [#​60](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/60)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.6...v0.0.7>

</details>
